name: Better Than Sex Cake/ Chocolate
recipeIngredient: 1 package Chocolate butter cake mix or 1 package German sweet chocolate mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss the chocolate chips and pecans in one-third of the cake mix, set aside.
2. In a large bowl, beat together the remaining ingredients for 3 minutes until smooth.
3. Gently fold in the chocolate chips and chopped pecans.
4. Pour the batter into a greased and floured bundt pan.
5. Bake at 359°F (180°C) for 50 minutes.
6. For the topping: Mix half a cup of butterscotch topping with one-fourth cup of cream.
7. Once the cake is cooled, make holes in it using a fork.
8. Pour the butterscotch mixture over the top of the cooled cake.
9. Before serving, garnish each piece of cake with whip cream, butterscotch, and Heath bar bits.
